headlines.h: Markets React To: can chug a whole jug
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.

headlines.h: Opinion: Take as many as you need... (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “Are we surprised?"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).

headlines.h: Weather Alert: He’s fully charged and ready for more treats
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
